cookbook.diffusers_no_torch: Diffusion serving requires PyTorch and diffusers.
cookbook.model_gated: Model access is gated or unauthorized.
cookbook.traceback_detected: Python traceback detected during serve startup.

diagnosis.no_gpu_memory: Not enough free GPU memory to load the model.
diagnosis.gpu_oom: GPU out of memory during model loading.
diagnosis.tp_incompatible: Tensor parallelism config is incompatible with the model.
diagnosis.context_too_large: Context window is too large for available GPU memory.
diagnosis.auto_tool_choice: Model does not support auto tool choice.
diagnosis.modelopt_quant: ModelOpt LM-head quantization detected. Use the vLLM convert script.
diagnosis.kernel_mismatch: CUDA kernel mismatch — try rebuilding or updating the kernel package.
diagnosis.port_in_use: Port is already in use by another process.
diagnosis.no_gpus_visible: No GPUs visible to the container or process.
diagnosis.unsupported_gpu: GPU architecture is not supported by this build.
diagnosis.vllm_not_installed: vLLM is not installed. Install it with pip install vllm.
diagnosis.sglang_deps_missing: SGLang native dependencies missing. Install libnuma-dev, python3-dev, and sglang-kernel.
diagnosis.cmake_missing: CMake is required but not found on PATH.
diagnosis.compiler_missing: C/C++ compiler (gcc/clang) is required but not found.
diagnosis.git_missing: Git is required but not found on PATH.
diagnosis.no_gguf_found: No GGUF model found matching the requested name or path.
diagnosis.model_access_denied: Access to the requested model is denied or the model does not exist.
